textPlain: Oh no. This makes me sad and brings up all kind of lost youth feelings.The stone roses eponymous first album changed my life man. It was wonderful. I’d only really listened to hip hop, rap and Michael Jackson before that and it ushered in the whole UK wave of the early 2000’s.It’s funny though for Ian Browns voice is a huge part of that album but he was so so bad live and now he’s even worse, and phones it in big time.Very disappointing.
Whenever I hear that LP I instinctively start "Manchester walking"; dangerous as it leads to hair growth between the eyebrows
